author: Priya Sharma
message: Refactor order status mapping - add 'partially_refunded' and 'pending_review' statuses
diff_summary: Renamed enum field 'order_status' values from uppercase (PAID, REFUNDED) to lowercase (paid, refunded) for consistency with API v2 response format. Added two new status values.

author: Arjun Mehta
message: Bump Spark Structured Streaming checkpoint interval from 30s to 60s for cost optimization
diff_summary: Increased checkpoint interval to reduce small-file overhead in the lake. No schema changes.

author: Sara Lin
message: Add support for multi-currency revenue normalization
diff_summary: Added a join against warehouse.dim_exchange_rates to convert all revenue figures to USD before aggregation. Assumes dim_exchange_rates has a row for every (currency, date) combination.

author: Arjun Mehta
message: Increase batch size for SAP export ingestion from 5000 to 20000 rows
diff_summary: Increased batch size to reduce number of API calls to SAP export endpoint. Memory allocation for the ingestion pod was not changed.

author: Diego Fernandez
message: Add Meta Ads API v21 fields for creative-level attribution
diff_summary: Updated Meta Ads client to request additional fields (creative_id, creative_name) introduced in API v21. Field is optional in the response per Meta docs.

author: Priya Sharma
message: Minor: update Zendesk API client timeout from 30s to 60s
diff_summary: Increased HTTP client timeout to handle occasional slow Zendesk API responses during peak hours.
